## ScreenShotPP v0.2.2

A bug-fix release for Windows.

### Fixes

- Fixed a crash on Windows where pressing the capture shortcut would instantly
  close the app. The Windows Graphics Capture path now runs on its own dedicated
  thread (with panic isolation), so capturing from the global-shortcut callback
  no longer aborts the process.
